text:
/ci1 2 なんだ、あの原生種！
なんか変なのが刺さってるし
さっきの奴より狂暴になってる！

/ci1 2 落ち着け！
多少、強くなってるだけだ！
刺さってる核を狙え！

/ci1 2 What's that sylvant!?
There's a strange thing sticking out of it,
and it's more violent than the one before!

/ci1 2 Calm down! It's somewhat stronger;
that's it! Aim for the Core sticking out of it!

なんだ、あの原生種！
なんか変なのが刺さってるし
さっきの奴より狂暴になってる！

落ち着け！
多少、強くなってるだけだ！
刺さってる核を狙え！

What's that sylvant!?
There's a strange thing sticking out of it,
and it's more violent than the one before!

Calm down! It's somewhat stronger; that's it!
Aim for the Core sticking out of it!
